The Apothecary Diaries.description: Maomao lived a peaceful life with her apothecary father until she is kidnapped and sold into service at the Emperor's palace. Using her sharp wit and medical knowledge, she quickly begins solving mysteries inside the inner court.

1.title: Maomao
1.description: Maomao, an apothecary from the pleasure district, is kidnapped and sold into service within the Emperor's rear palace. While attempting to remain inconspicuous, she learns of the mysterious illnesses plaguing the imperial infants.

2.title: The Chilly Apothecary
2.description: Having been promoted to a lady-in-waiting for Lady Gyokuyou due to her medical deduction skills, Maomao prepares specialized tonics and evaluates daily dishes for lethal toxins.

3.title: The Ghost of the Rear Palace
3.description: Maomao receives an intriguing request involving rumors of a ghost wandering around the palace walls at night, leading her into another captivating investigation.

4.title: The Threat of the Imperial Courtyard
4.description: A threat looms large over the inner court when an unusual substance creates severe political tensions among competing high-ranking consorts.

5.title: An Imperial Task
5.description: Jinshi presents Maomao with a complex task regarding a special preparation request, pulling her deeper into palace administrative politics.

6.title: The Garden Party
6.description: The Grand Garden Party approaches, and Maomao is chosen as an official poison tester, exposing her to heightened danger among the imperial guests.

7.title: A Home Visit
7.description: Maomao handles the aftermath of the chaotic garden party and is granted a brief leave to visit her home in the pleasure district.

8.title: Wheat Stalks
8.description: Back in her hometown, Maomao gets caught up in a local incident that requires her practical medicinal expertise before returning to court duties.

9.title: Execution of Suspicion
9.description: Jinshi investigates an internal security breach while Maomao inspects an odd suicide case that doesn't quite look what it seems.

10.title: Honey
10.description: Maomao unlocks a dark connection involving hidden poisons disguised as everyday food ingredients, narrowing down suspects within the inner circles.

11.title: Reducing Two to One
11.description: Tensions mount when an unexpected internal betrayal threatens the safety of Lady Gyokuyou, calling for fast tactical deduction.

12.title: The Eunuch and the Courtesan
12.description: Maomao deals with complex familial secrets unraveling directly inside the district, setting up powerful shifts for the path ahead.

13.title: An Outing to the Outer Court
13.description: Maomao gets rehired, this time directly serving Jinshi in the Outer Court. She adjusts to a new environment while drawing unwanted attention.

14.title: The New Pure Consort
14.description: A replacement consort arrives at the palace. Maomao is tasked with instructing her on proper inner court customs and etiquette.

15.title: Minced Fish
15.description: Maomao investigates a mysterious food poisoning case involving a specific fish dish served to an influential military official.

16.title: The Lead
16.description: Investigating a series of strange workplace accidents around the palace workshops leads Maomao to connect an unexpected trail of clues.

17.title: A Walk Town
17.description: While accompanying Jinshi on a stealthy undercover patrol through town, Maomao helps solve a complex inheritance riddle left by a deceased blacksmith.

18.title: Lapis Lazuli
18.description: Maomao looks into a high-ranking official's strange obsession with a legendary blue pigment and uncovers hidden corporate espionage.

19.title: Chance and Coincidence
19.description: A ceremonial gathering turns critical when Maomao notices a pattern of minor mistakes indicating an imminent threat to an upcoming ritual.

20.title: The Thorn Apple
20.description: Following a tense rescue mission, Maomao is treated for injuries and learns deeper secrets regarding palace military factions.

21.title: The Strategy to Buy Out a Courtesan
21.description: Maomao concocts a clever, deceptive strategy to help an old friend negotiate a buyout contract with the master of the Verdigris House.

22.title: Blue Roses
22.description: Lakan challenges Maomao to produce a collection of out-of-season blue roses for an upcoming banquet, initiating a tense intellectual battle.

23.title: The Concubine and the Apothecary
23.description: The historical truth behind Lakan's past actions and his complex connection to Maomao's mother is finally revealed in full detail.

24.title: The Courtesan and the Apothecary
24.description: Season Finale. Following a formal redemption party, Maomao performs a solemn ceremonial dance on the palace wall, completing a major phase of her journey.
